name: Eversole Studio
description: Design and infrastructure tokens for anthonyeversole.com

base-charcoal.role: Primary text and dark section backgrounds

brand-rust.role: Primary brand accent — CTAs, kickers, active nav states, rust fills

hairline-seam.role: Structural grid seam between content columns

serif.role: Editorial display headings, pull quotes, price callouts, large-body

sans.role: Navigation, kickers, labels, utility body copy, buttons

component-headings.description: Bold sans-serif for sharp, high-end component labels inside cards and grid columns — distinct from editorial serif display headings

gateway-card-headline.usage: Session type labels inside 3-column booking gateway cards (Studio Session, Junior Session)

mechanics-headline.usage: Section headings inside 2-column Studio Mechanics grid

pricing-table-session-name.usage: Session title labels in the pricing matrix table left column, rendered on dark ink background

cta-button-primary.description: Solid rust fill at rest; transparent outline on hover

remote-teaching-baseline.standard: Dr. Ian Howell vocal pedagogy remote audio parameters

primary-audio-device.role: Vocal microphone input — primary streaming device
primary-audio-device.type: External USB or XLR condenser microphone
examples: Shure SM7B via Focusrite Scarlett Solo (XLR/USB interface)
primary-audio-device.connection: Wired only — USB direct or XLR into USB audio interface
primary-audio-device.prohibited: Built-in laptop or tablet microphone — not permitted under any circumstance

secondary-accompaniment-device.role: Dedicated accompaniment track playback — isolated from primary streaming device
secondary-accompaniment-device.requirement: Must be a physically separate device from the machine running Zoom
secondary-accompaniment-device.rationale: Running backing tracks through the same device as Zoom audio creates driver latency conflicts and triggers system-level audio ducking, which compresses or mutes the vocal signal in real time

zoom-configuration.mode: Original Sound for Musicians / High-Fidelity Music Mode
zoom-configuration.headphones: Wired only — Bluetooth prohibited due to codec-introduced latency
zoom-configuration.connection: Ethernet preferred; minimum 25 Mbps upload for stable lossless audio
